query:
SELECT
  a.repair_intelligence_json,
  a.cost_intelligence_json,
  a.fraud_score_breakdown_json,
  a.causal_verdict_json,
  a.damage_analysis_json,
  a.summary_narrative,
  a.key_findings_json,
  a.physics_json,
  a.adjuster_narrative
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.claim_id = 2730001
LIMIT 1;
